item.title: Hear the Tri-Power Engine in a '59 Classic
item.description: A classic 1959 car with a Tri-Power setup is showcased for its iconic engine sound and performance feel. What makes Tri-Power engines so legendary?

media:content.media:title: Hear the Tri-Power Engine in a '59 Classic
media:content.media:description: A classic 1959 car with a Tri-Power setup is showcased for its iconic engine sound and performance feel. What makes Tri-Power engines so legendary?

item.title: 1968 Corvette: Street to Track Story
item.description: A 1968 Corvette transitions from street use to track-focused performance with upgrades and tuning. What changes make a classic ready for racing?

media:content.media:title: 1968 Corvette: Street to Track Story
media:content.media:description: A 1968 Corvette transitions from street use to track-focused performance with upgrades and tuning. What changes make a classic ready for racing?

item.title: Hand-Built Luxury: Limited Edition Hurst 300H
item.description: A rare Hurst 300H showcases hand-built craftsmanship and limited-production luxury performance design. What makes low-production cars so desirable?

media:content.media:title: Hand-Built Luxury: Limited Edition Hurst 300H
media:content.media:description: A rare Hurst 300H showcases hand-built craftsmanship and limited-production luxury performance design. What makes low-production cars so desirable?

item.title: A 10-Year 1965 Mustang Fastback Rebuild
item.description: A long-term restoration brings a 1965 Mustang Fastback back to life through years of dedication and detailed work. What keeps a project like this going for a decade?

media:content.media:title: A 10-Year 1965 Mustang Fastback Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A long-term restoration brings a 1965 Mustang Fastback back to life through years of dedication and detailed work. What keeps a project like this going for a decade?

item.title: 1960 Chevy Impala 348 4-Speed
item.description: A classic 1960 Chevrolet Impala equipped with a 348 V8 and 4-speed manual transmission is featured in detail. What makes this combination so iconic for collectors?

item.title: Classic 1961 Oldsmobile Starfire Cruiser
item.description: A look at the stylish 1961 Oldsmobile Starfire Cruiser, highlighting its classic design and luxury-era details. What makes this Oldsmobile stand out among early ‘60s cruisers?

media:content.media:description: A look at the stylish 1961 Oldsmobile Starfire Cruiser, highlighting its classic design and luxury-era details. What makes this Oldsmobile stand out among early ‘60s cruisers?

item.title: Natalie Wood’s 1963 Buick Riviera
item.description: A look at the elegant 1963 Buick Riviera connected to actress Natalie Wood, blending Hollywood history with classic car style. What makes celebrity-owned classics so fascinating?

item.title: 1954 Buick Special With Under 28K Miles
item.description: A remarkably preserved 1954 Buick Special with under 28,000 miles showcases originality and vintage charm. How does mileage impact classic car value?

item.title: 1967 Shelby GT500 428 with Rare A/C Option

item.title: A 6-Figure Car Preserved as a Time Capsule
item.description: A rare and valuable classic car remains preserved like a time capsule with original details still intact. What makes untouched classics so desirable?

item.title: One-Owner 1970 Chevrolet El Camino
item.description: A well-preserved 1970 Chevrolet El Camino with a one-owner history and classic utility-meets-performance appeal. What makes survivor cars so special?
